approved_by: registry:rating_engine_changelog (v1.2 activation row — founder, two-person gate)
_note: v1.2 (B66-f1 pt2): identical to v1.1 EXCEPT labels.cohort_grouping_key — peer cohorts now group on the VALIDATED canonical mf_funds.sebi_category (B66 taxonomy) instead of the raw category string. Weights, margins, and all other methodology UNCHANGED. ACTIVATED 2026-06-14 under the B6/B28 two-person gate (founder = approved_by != created_by) + founder deploy approval, per ADR-0034. Read-only prod backtest (2026-06-13, 14,041 funds) measured 196 funds (1.40%) changing label — 113 from the dissolved 4,618-fund Income pseudo-cohort (-> uncohorted -> on_track + COHORT_NO_CANONICAL_CATEGORY context per B71) and 83 ELSS (incl. 57 second-order peer-median flips); net on_track +102 / off_track -92 / in_form -10; insufficient_data +0 (within the 5% churn gate). Prereqs B71 + B58-f5 landed first (PR #131). The DB registry (rating_engine_changelog v1.2 row) is the authoritative activation state; this file flag is the no-DB-context fallback. v1.1 was the prior active version (registry row e1d46e5d; ACTIVATED 2026-06-11). Ledger reviews/b66f1-pt2-cohort-sebi-rewire.md; ADR-0034.
_double_counting_guard: earnings_revision_trend and relative_strength_vs_sector live ONLY in trend (never momentum). A sub-factor in two axes must fail the config validator.

missing_data.whole_axis_uncomputable: reweight_remaining_axes; flag partial_coverage; confidence capped at medium

confidence.display: x100 percentage only when calibration gate open; launch = band only
confidence.high_confidence_guard: confidence > 0.70 requires >= 3 contributing signals AND high-reliability sources
confidence.exposure_gate: numeric % suppressed until backtest calibration reliability-curve within +/-10%

risk_factor_formula.note: higher axis score = LOWER risk; each term sector-normalized; inv = inverse-direction
risk_factor_formula._concentration_note: axes.risk lists 7 sub-factors incl. concentration (FINAL_SCORING_SPEC §2.5), but this v1 formula weights only 6 (§6.1). concentration is INTENTIONALLY UNWEIGHTED in v1 — RESOLVED as a documented deferral, not a contradiction (B11 / ADR-0020). It is a v2 candidate: a weight is set only once a reliable data source + sector normalization exist, at the backtest pass-gate under the two-person methodology gate (B6). axes.risk = factor catalog; this weight map = activated subset; a catalogued-unweighted sub-factor is valid.

fair_value.exposure: Pro-gated; numeric never on public DOM

labels.primary: deterministic rule table on category-relative performance (NOT a pure function of the score)

cohort_margin_pct._unit: return percentage points beyond the category-peer median (1Y/3Y) before a fund counts as out/under-performing; AMFI class = prefix of category before ' - '; unknown class uses default (wider band, on_track fail-safe)

labels._cohort_grouping_key_note: mf_funds column peers are grouped into a category cohort by (B66-f1 pt2). v1.2 ACTIVE = 'sebi_category' (the validated canonical SEBI leaf); v1.1 was 'category' (raw AMFI string). Legacy umbrellas Income/Growth/Gilt are sebi_category NULL → uncohorted → on_track + COHORT_NO_CANONICAL_CATEGORY context (B71), never auto-mapped. ACTIVATED 2026-06-14 under the two-person gate (approved_by != created_by) + founder deploy approval (ADR-0034); the prod backtest measured a 196-fund / 1.40% label shift, within the 5% churn gate. Mirrors backend/dhanradar/mf/tasks _COHORT_GROUPING_KEY — lockstep test-enforced (test_cohort_grouping_key_lockstep_with_config).

rule_table.off_track: underperforming category 12m+ OR fund-manager change / emerging structural concern
